items.title: ‘The Odyssey’ Website Lets You Watch the Trailer in All Six Different Formats
items.summary: The website for Christopher Nolan's upcoming The Odyssey lets viewers watch the movie trailer in all the film's different formats, from IMAX 70mm to Dolby Vision. [Read More]

items.title: Japan’s Top Volleyball Competition Bans All Photography Over Fears About ‘Inappropriate’ Images
items.summary: Japan's top beach volleyball competition banned all photography after players raised concerns about voyeuristic and "inappropriate" images being taken during matches. [Read More]

items.title: Cadrage Studio Launches in Early Access – Pre-Production Suite from the Director’s Viewfinder Team
items.summary: The team behind Cadrage, the director’s viewfinder app used by more than 100,000 filmmakers, has released Cadrage Studio in early access. This native iPhone, iPad, and Mac app pulls script, shot lists…
